Notes: Junior Kristin Kaczynski scored 22 points, including the 1000th of her career
in leading RPI to a win in the first round of the ECAC tournament.  Kaczynski
also grabbed 12 rebounds for the double-double.  Latham native and Shaker High
graduate, Jaimee McGivern led the Golden Flyers with 12 points in the loss.
Game.Officials: Mark Lanni,  Kathy Lochner,  Ed Inglis
